info.title: KmerHosting API
info.description: Canonical OpenAPI contract for the KmerHosting platform. All supported public endpoints use the /api/v1 namespace.

post.summary: Send a chat prompt to the AI assistant
Check whether a domain is available

get.summary: Get the current user credit balance

post.summary: Create an order from checkout data
Pay an order with account credit
Create a standalone domain DNS record

delete.summary: Delete a standalone domain DNS record

post.summary: Create an included domain DNS record

delete.summary: Delete an included domain DNS record

post.summary: Add an item to the cart
Transfer a remote file into storage

get.summary: List users currently online in storage
